message:
feat(abi): add fenv_abi module and POSIX 2008 locale extensions [bd-2vv.4, bd-ldj.4]

fenv_abi: Complete <fenv.h> ABI surface (11 functions) via host glibc
delegation using versioned dlvsym_next lookups:
- Rounding: fegetround, fesetround
- Exceptions: feclearexcept, fetestexcept, feraiseexcept
- Exception flags: fegetexceptflag, fesetexceptflag
- Environment: fegetenv, fesetenv, feholdexcept, feupdateenv
- Integration tests: 7 tests covering round-trips, null pointer
  rejection, and exception flag save/restore

locale_abi: POSIX.1-2008 thread-safe locale API with C-locale semantics:
- newlocale, uselocale, freelocale, duplocale
- Uses sentinel handle for deterministic C-locale behavior
- Moved locale_abi to ungated Phase 2 (no glibc calls needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
